# Awesome GPT Image 2

Browse 144 GPT Image 2 prompt examples with generated images, reusable tags, image-generation use cases, and prompt text for product mockups, UI, games, diagrams, and storytelling.

Primary URL: https://gptimg2.best/
Repository: https://github.com/pyth0nb3st/awesome-gpt-image-2
Creator tools: https://drillso.com/ and https://vibeart.app/
Gallery JSON: https://gptimg2.best/gallery.json
Sitemap: https://gptimg2.best/sitemap.xml

The site contains 144 generated image examples. Each example includes a repository-local image, full prompt text, dimensions, creation time, and semantic tags for prompt discovery.
Dedicated prompt pages: 144
Dedicated tag pages: 24

Top tags:
- product-mockup: 85
- typography: 80
- game-design: 69
- ui-mockup: 63
- storytelling: 56
- lighting-weather: 37
- infographic: 35
- photoreal: 35
- worldbuilding: 33

- interior-design: 23
- material-study: 19
- evaluation: 16

- productivity-visual: 15
